---
title: "Other Experiences"
subtitle: "Organizations, Activities, and Community Involvement"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-title: "Page Sections"
---

## Overview

This page focuses on experiences beyond coursework, including student organizations, activity-based learning, leadership roles, and service.

---

## Organizations and Activities

::: {.experience-card .theme-ocean}
### Science Club, Keuka College
- **Role:** President (2024-Present) | VP (2023-2024) | Social Media Manager (2023-Present)
- **Duration:** 2021 - Present
- **Focus:** Student-led science initiatives and engagement on campus.
:::

::: {.experience-card .theme-sunset}
### Disability, Accessibility, Community, and Engagement (DACE)
- **Role:** Treasurer & Establishing Member
- **Duration:** 2023 - Present
- **Focus:** Promoting accessibility and engagement at Keuka College.
:::

::: {.experience-card .theme-aurora}
### Campus Activities Board, Keuka College
- **Role:** President (2022) | Interfaith and Intercultural Community Coordinator (2022)
- **Duration:** 2021 - Present
- **Focus:** Event planning and managing campus-wide engagement.
:::

---

## Timeline Highlights

- **2023 - Present** Field Period and ePortfolio Demonstrator/Instructor
- **2021 - 2022** Cheerleading, Keuka College
- **2021 - 2022** Nursing Club (Student Senate Representative)

---

## Leadership Roles

| Year | Position | Organization |
|---|---|---|
| 2024-Present | President | Science Club, Keuka College |
| 2023-Present | Treasurer & Establishing Member | DACE @ Keuka College |
| 2022 | President | Campus Activities Board, Keuka College |
| 2023-2024 | Vice President | Science Club, Keuka College |
| 2023-Present | Social Media Manager | Science Club, Keuka College |
| 2022 | Interfaith Community Coord. | Campus Activities Board, Keuka College |
| 2021-2022 | Student Senate Rep. | Nursing Club, Keuka College |

---

## Clubs and Sports Gallery

![Activity image placeholder](images/club-1.svg)
*Caption: [Add event name, place, and date.]*

![Activity image placeholder](images/club-2.svg)
*Caption: [Add event name, place, and date.]*

---

## Recent Volunteer and Service Work

- **Everybunny Counts Rabbit Rescue** - Volunteer
- **H.O.R.S.E. of Connecticut** - Volunteer
- **American Red Cross** - Blood Drive Volunteer
- **Jim Casey Foundation** - Youth Leadership Institute Participant
- **CT DCF** - Youth Advisory Board Member
- **Faith Living Church** - Nursery/Childcare Volunteer

---

## Reflection

:::: {.callout-note title="Growth Through Participation"}
Participating in student organisations and community service has shaped me as much as any course or project. Leading the Science Club taught me that **vision without communication is just an idea** — real change happens when you listen, delegate, and bring people along. Founding DACE reminded me that inclusion is not a feature to add later but a design principle from day one. And volunteering with animal rescues and youth programmes has reinforced a simple truth: showing up consistently, even when it's unglamorous, is how trust is built. These experiences inform how I approach data science — with curiosity, care for the humans behind the numbers, and a commitment to making my work accessible to everyone.
::::
